stories.title: WWE Clash in Italy LIVE: Results and analysis for ...
stories.summary: Andreas Hale breaks down all the action from Italy's first WWE PLE in Turin.

stories.title: SGA calls MVP year a 'failure' after OKC falls sho...
stories.summary: Despite claiming his second straight MVP, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander called his season a failure after the Thunder were eliminated before getting a chance to defend their title in the NBA Finals.

stories.title: Ball State's Yates-Lyons, 18, dies after being sho...
stories.summary: Gavin Yates-Lyons, a freshman defensive back on the Ball State football team, died Saturday at the age of 18.

stories.title: Norway stuns Canada in OT of bronze medal game
stories.summary: Norway stunned Canada 3-2 in overtime of the bronze medal game to capture its first ice hockey world championship medal.

stories.title: WCF win gets Wemby closer to 'childhood dream'
stories.summary: The Spurs eliminated the defending champion Thunder in Game 7 of the Western Conference finals, a 111-103 victory fueled by center Victor Wembanyama's 22 points and seven rebounds.
